text:
miwi        2009-06-06 22:46:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-darcsver    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  py-darcsver is a python module to generate a version
  number from darcs history.
  
  WWW:    http://pypi.python.org/pypi/darcsver
  
  PR:             ports/135279
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3511    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/devel/py-darcsver/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-darcsver/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/py-darcsver/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/devel/py-darcsver/pkg-plist (new)
